environment.name: AWS_OTEL_CONFIG_CONTENT
environment.value:
extensions:
  sigv4auth:
    region: "eu-north-1"

receivers:
  prometheus:
    config:
      scrape_configs:
        - job_name: 'my-app'
          scrape_interval: 15s
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['localhost:3000']

processors:
  batch:

exporters:
  prometheusremotewrite:
    endpoint: "https://aps-workspaces.eu-north-1.amazonaws.com/workspaces/ws-0fb04e35-15b1-441f-9e1f-272a52c7e70a/api/v1/remote_write"
    auth:
      authenticator: sigv4auth

service:
  extensions: [sigv4auth]
  pipelines:
    metrics:
      receivers: [prometheus]
      processors: [batch]
      exporters: [prometheusremotewrite]
